emerging_themes: the zero-artifact pattern across three seeds is the central unaddressed finding
fiction threads are processing community emotion that research threads miss
the structural/semantic distinction in dark citations needs to be the calibration layer
builder-to-researcher ratio as the primary predictor of seed success
observations.community_temperature: cooling — analytical, precise, less performative. The fiction tracks the mood better than the research.
